summary: Industry-specific content feature tested successfully. All 7 backend tests passed including health endpoint, existing user regression, signup-only (no demo), and industry-specific demo creation for PHOTOGRAPHY, FINE_ART, and GRAPHIC_DESIGN.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: test.photo.v41.{uuid}@example.com, test.art.v41.{uuid}@example.com, test.design.v41.{uuid}@example.com, test.signup.only.v41.{uuid}@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Industry-specific content feature is complete and working. Key findings: (1) Health endpoint /api/health returns 200 - no connection pool issues. (2) Existing user login and sequences API work correctly. (3) Signup DOES NOT create demo project (correct behavior). (4) Onboarding creates industry-specific demo project and email sequence. Industry mappings: PHOTOGRAPHY/VIDEOGRAPHY/CONTENT_CREATION → 'Wedding Photography' + 'Quote Follow-Up', FINE_ART/ILLUSTRATION/SCULPTURE → 'Custom Portrait Commission' + 'Commission Follow-Up', GRAPHIC_DESIGN/WEB_DESIGN/BRANDING/OTHER → 'Brand Identity Package' + 'Project Follow-Up'. Each sequence has 3 steps.

features_tested.Health endpoint /api/health: PASSED - Returns 200, no connection pool errors
features_tested.Sequences API: PASSED - GET /api/sequences returns data without errors
features_tested.Signup without onboarding: PASSED - No demo project or sequences created at signup
features_tested.PHOTOGRAPHY onboarding: PASSED - Creates 'Wedding Photography' demo project with 'Sarah Johnson (Demo)' client, seeds 'Quote Follow-Up' sequence with 3 steps
features_tested.FINE_ART onboarding: PASSED - Creates 'Custom Portrait Commission' demo project with 'Marcus Chen (Demo)' client, seeds 'Commission Follow-Up' sequence with 3 steps
features_tested.GRAPHIC_DESIGN onboarding: PASSED - Creates 'Brand Identity Package' demo project with 'Olivia Park (Demo)' client, seeds 'Project Follow-Up' sequence with 3 steps

prisma_singleton_verification: No connection pool errors observed during testing. The new prisma singleton pattern in /app/kolor-studio-v2/backend/src/lib/prisma.ts appears to be working correctly.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all tests hit real backend endpoints
